english: Tell the believing men to lower their gaze.
Tell the believing women to lower their gaze.

arabic: وَلَا تَقْرَبُوا الزِّنَىٰ إِنَّهُ كَانَ فَاحِشَةً وَسَاءَ سَبِيلًا
english: Do not go near zina. It is a grave indecency and an evil path.
The believers guard their private parts.

arabic: إِلَّا عَلَىٰ أَزْوَاجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُهُمْ
english: They seek intimacy only through the lawful bond Allah allowed.

arabic: فَمَنِ ابْتَغَىٰ وَرَاءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْعَادُونَ
english: Whoever goes beyond the lawful limit is among the transgressors.
Among the successful are those who guard their private parts.

arabic: إِلَّا عَلَىٰ أَزْوَاجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُهُمْ
english: They keep desire within what Allah made lawful for them.

arabic: فَمَنِ ابْتَغَىٰ وَرَاءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْعَادُونَ
english: Seeking beyond the lawful boundary is transgression.
Those who cannot yet marry should remain chaste.
Allah praises the men and women who guard their chastity.
The servants of the Most Merciful do not commit zina.

arabic: إِنَّ الصَّلَاةَ تَنْهَىٰ عَنِ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنكَرِ
english: Prayer should pull the heart away from indecency and wrongdoing.

arabic: وَلَا تَقْرَبُوا الْفَوَاحِشَ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهَا وَمَا بَطَنَ
english: Do not go near shameless deeds, whether open or hidden.

arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَا حَرَّمَ رَبِّيَ الْفَوَاحِشَ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهَا وَمَا بَطَنَ
english: Your Lord has forbidden indecency, public and private alike.
Success belongs to the one who restrains the soul from desire.
For the one who resists low desire, Paradise is the final home.
Yusuf was protected when he remembered the proof of his Lord.

arabic: رَبِّ السِّجْنُ أَحَبُّ إِلَيَّ مِمَّا يَدْعُونَنِي إِلَيْهِ
english: Yusuf preferred hardship over answering the call to sin.

arabic: وَالَّذِينَ إِذَا فَعَلُوا فَاحِشَةً أَوْ ظَلَمُوا أَنْفُسَهُمْ ذَكَرُوا اللَّهَ
english: When they slip into sin, they remember Allah and seek forgiveness.

arabic: كُتِبَ عَلَى ابْنِ آدَمَ نَصِيبُهُ مِنَ الزِّنَا
english: The child of Adam has been warned about a share of zina that can begin before the final act.
The zina of the eyes is the forbidden look.
The zina of the ears is to listen to what feeds desire.
The zina of the tongue is corrupt speech.
The zina of the hand is the unlawful touch or reach.
The zina of the foot is to walk toward sin.
The heart can crave and fantasize in ways that pull a person toward sin.
The private parts either confirm that path of sin or refuse it.

arabic: يَا مَعْشَرَ الشَّبَابِ مَنِ اسْتَطَاعَ مِنْكُمُ الْبَاءَةَ فَلْيَتَزَوَّجْ
english: Whoever is able to marry should marry.

arabic: وَمَنْ لَمْ يَسْتَطِعْ فَعَلَيْهِ بِالصَّوْمِ فَإِنَّهُ لَهُ وِجَاءٌ
english: Whoever cannot marry should fast, because fasting weakens desire.

arabic: مَنْ يَضْمَنْ لِي مَا بَيْنَ لَحْيَيْهِ وَمَا بَيْنَ رِجْلَيْهِ أَضْمَنْ لَهُ الْجَنَّةَ
english: Whoever guards the tongue and the private parts is promised Paradise.

arabic: مَا تَرَكْتُ بَعْدِي فِتْنَةً أَضَرَّ عَلَى الرِّجَالِ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ
english: One of the hardest trials for men can be temptation through women.
Beware of entering upon women in a way that opens the door to temptation.
Carelessness with close non-mahram relatives can be spiritually deadly.

arabic: لَا يَخْلُوَنَّ رَجُلٌ بِامْرَأَةٍ إِلَّا كَانَ ثَالِثَهُمَا الشَّيْطَانُ
english: When a man is secluded with a woman, Shaytan is the third present.

arabic: لَا يَنْظُرِ الرَّجُلُ إِلَى عَوْرَةِ الرَّجُلِ وَلَا الْمَرْأَةُ إِلَى عَوْرَةِ الْمَرْأَةِ
english: Do not look at the awrah of another person.
If desire is stirred by an unlawful glance, return to the lawful spouse.

arabic: إِنَّ الْمَرْأَةَ تُقْبِلُ فِي صُورَةِ شَيْطَانٍ وَتُدْبِرُ فِي صُورَةِ شَيْطَانٍ
english: Desire can dress temptation in a deceptive form, so guard the first response.
Allah helps the person who marries seeking chastity.

arabic: رَجُلٌ دَعَتْهُ امْرَأَةٌ ذَاتُ مَنْصِبٍ وَجَمَالٍ فَقَالَ إِنِّي أَخَافُ اللَّهَ
english: Among the honored is the one who is tempted by beauty and status but says: I fear Allah.
Modesty is a branch of faith.
True modesty only brings good.

arabic: مَا كَانَ الْفُحْشُ فِي شَيْءٍ إِلَّا شَانَهُ
english: Indecency stains whatever it enters.

arabic: وَمَا كَانَ الْحَيَاءُ فِي شَيْءٍ إِلَّا زَانَهُ
english: Modesty beautifies whatever it enters.
Leave him, for modesty is part of faith.

arabic: لَا يَزْنِي الزَّانِي حِينَ يَزْنِي وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ
english: A believer is stripped of that state of faith while committing zina.
Even after grave sin, the door of repentance is still offered.
Be on guard against the pull of worldly life and sexual temptation.

arabic: فَجَعَلَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَصْرِفُ وَجْهَ الْفَضْلِ إِلَى الشِّقِّ الْآخَرِ
english: The Prophet turned Al-Fadl's face away from the woman to stop the gaze.

arabic: يَا عَلِيُّ لَا تُتْبِعِ النَّظْرَةَ النَّظْرَةَ فَإِنَّ لَكَ الْأُولَى وَلَيْسَتْ لَكَ الْآخِرَةُ
english: Do not follow one glance with another. The first may be excused, but not the second.
